title: Nial (disambiguation)
content:
'''Nial''' can refer to:

*'''[[Nial Declann]]''' - A [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitive]] [[Grand Admiral/Legends|Grand Admiral]] in the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]].
*'''[[Nial Organa]]''' - Member of [[House of Organa/Legends|House Organa of Alderaan]] and the adopted cousin of [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Princess Leia]].

{{Disambig}}
